entry.title: Re: Extension wizard not working
entry.content: I have the same situation. I followed all the instructions and got the same message: "Missing Configuration."

entry.title: Re: Custom HDM: Implementation BADI_HDM_CUSTOM_ENABLE exa...
entry.content:
Good Morning,

Thanks for this late answer 🙂

Your documentation is quite different from what I performed:
SE18 -> Badi Name:BADI_HDM_CUSTOM_ENABLE -> Create
Enhancement Spot: ZES_HDM_ATTACHMENTS
Composite Enhancement Spot: ZES_HDM_ATTACHMENTS
Create Composite Spot
Composite Enhancement Spot: ZES_HDM_ATTACHMENTS
Short Text: Enable Custom HDM
Package: ZBC
Save
Save
Enhancement Implementation -> Activate
Enh. Spot Element Definitions -> Create Badi
Name: ZES_HDM_ATTACHMENTS
Description: Activate Custom HDM
Enh. Spot Element Definitions -> Right Click on BADI_HDM_CUSTOM_ENABLE
-> Create Badi implementation
Implementation -> Right Click -> Create Badi implementation
Badi Implementation: ZES_HDM_ATTACHMENTS
Description: Activate Custom HDM
Implementing Class: ZCL_HDM_CUSTOM_ENABLE
Implementing Class -> Double Click -> Create Implementation
---
method IF_HDM_CUSTOM_ENABLE~CHECK_HDM_CUSTOM_ENABLE.
EV_ENABLE = 'X'.
endmethod.
---
Save
Activate
Back -> Activate

Have a nice day.

entry.title: Risk-Based Authentication works by adding a clientContext ?
entry.content:
Hi All , 

I am working with Risk-Based Authentication with account locked , with X number of failed attempts during a time period , i saw notes from SAP specifying that the clientContext is required , my integration is server to server , what does it means by adding clientContext - {clientIP: "0.0.0.0"} , we are not interacting via client , so what value value to be passed ?what is the impact of passing clientIP?

 

Many Thanks,

Ruchita

entry.title: Re: Migration of PO with third-party item. How to referen...
entry.content:
Hi,
I had checked the migration object modeler beforehand.
According to https://me.sap.com/notes/3324716 no field for BANF is supported.
Please elaborate what you mean by "text field".
Is it a field in the object modeler?

Best regards

entry.title: Re: M-series Apple Chip MacBooks and Abap Platform Trial containers using Docker and Podman
entry.content:
@dylan-drummond  A short update from my side. 

With Docker/Orbstack for Mac it is currently possible to run the 1909 image natively. 

The 2022 is still not working. Basically the hdbdaemon is not starting, based on the error message, I've the gut feeling that this is more related to this bug. https://github.com/docker/for-mac/issues/7058
As the error message is indicating that under pid768 something like hdbdaemon is expected and received something like rosetta/hdbdaemon. If this hypothesis is true, then not sure where to search, either docker container startup script or sapstart. Currently I've not that much time to investigate (and limited knowledge their)  But, I've the feeling that not much is missing to get the 2022 image running as well. 
@julieplummer20Do you guys have any hints? 
Bests Tom

entry.title: Re: Failed to compile web version

AB version: 3.8.0
COMMAND:

USER_METERING_ENABLED=true SHOW_SUBSCRIPTION_VERIFICATION_NOTIFICATION=false SUBSCRIPTION_VERIFICATION_NOTIFICATION_DISMISSIBLE=true NEXT_SUPPORT_RELATIVE_PATHS=true NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=12240 npxrnv export -p web -s standalone -c standalone --ci --yes --packageManager yarn

Command failed with exit code 1: npx rnv export -p web -s standalone -c standalone --ci --yes --packageManager yarn

entry.title: SAP MM
entry.content:
due to annual stock report to supplier X000000XX, we have found that quantity reported via EDI inventory report is different from quantity shown in our SAP (transaction MB5B). The concerned date is 31.12.2024. Material X000000XX(X000000XX). Quantity reported via EDI is 14 682 pcs and SAP shows 13 842 pcs. Both only report on Consignment stock, nothing else. Plant xxxx.
Quantity in IDOC on 31st dec is 14682.
And MB5B report with same date ha quantity 13842.
So difference of 840 quanity in IDOC and MB5B.

Why this is happening?
Which quantity should be correct?

entry.title: Re: SUBSTRING in ABAP
entry.content:
of course, yes. Try this

  SELECT field1, field2, 
    substring( field3, 1, 6 ) AS v_subfield3
      FROM table1 WHERE conditions

entry.title: LMS API - LearningItemDetails
entry.content:
Dear,

maybe someone have a suggestion for me what I'm misisng.  I tried the documentation example to receive the LearningItemDetails via api (admin token) from the LMS module. 

learningPlan/v1/LearningItemDetails?$filter=lisCriteria/itemID eq '<id>' and lisCriteria/itemTypeID eq '<type>' and lisCriteria/revisionDate eq <revisiondate>

But I receive on the error :  ERROR:  The request is not authorized, please try again\n"

Which kind of authorization is needed or reference ? 

Thank you

entry.title: Re: Product Compliance - SVT - affected applications vers...
entry.content:
Hello Harry,

in Substance Volume Tracking we use the following logic:

Starting from the logistic material which we extract from a material document, we determine the assigned packaged product (CCI) and the assigned unpackaged product (CCI). Then we determine the applications which are maintained at the unpackaged product. As next step we determine based on various criteria under which regulation (compliance requirement) the logistic material is tracking relevant. Once we know the relevant compliance requirement we determine from the definition of the compliance requirement the exempted applications. Then we compare the applications from the unpackaged product with the exempted application from the compliance requirement definition. If we see that all applications from the unpackaged product are maintained as exempted applications in the compliance definition, we conclude that the logistic material is not tracking relevant for the given regulation (compliance requirement).
If there is at least one application maintained at the unpackaged product which is not maintained as exempted application in the compliance requirement definition, then we consider the logistic material as tracking relevant for the given regulation (compliance requirement) - additional checks will be performed to further evaluate the tracking relevance of logistic material (e.g. check exemptions in the marketability assessments).
If there is no application maintained at the unpackaged product, then we we consider the logistic material as tracking relevant for the given regulation (compliance requirement) - additional checks will be performed to further evaluate the tracking relevance of logistic material (e.g. check exemptions in the marketability assessments).
We only consider the applications on the level of an unpackaged product. We do currently not consider the applications which are visible at the raw material under the Where-Used Information section.
In Substance Volume Tracking we do not have any functionality which is evaluating the affected applications which are maintained in a compliance requirement definition.
To my understanding the affected applications which are maintained in a compliance requirement definition describe the main scope of the regulation.

I hope this helps.

Please let me know in case you have any additional questions.

Best regards,
Michael

entry.title: Re: Link between billing plan settlement line and invoice
entry.content: Match VBRP-FPLNR & VBRP-FPLTR with FPLT-FPLNR & FPLT-FPLTR resp.

entry.title: Re: SAP MM
entry.content:
Hi,

The MB5B quantity (13,842 pcs) is likely correct as it reflects SAP’s finalized postings. The EDI discrepancy likely arose from timing or filtering issues. You need to Run MB51 (Stock Movement List) for the material and date to verify all movements and Check for late postings (e.g., goods issues after the IDOC was sent).

Regards

entry.title: Re: ABAP Dark Theme for NetWeaver
entry.content:
Thanks for that suggestion. I've use Solarize Dark previously but Dracula is also pretty good.

While plenty of people talk about Eclipse/ADT, it's a pretty awful tool compared with SE80 etc al, and while it may be SAP's direction of travel, here in 2025 plenty of people are still using the SAP GUI with ECC and Hana boxes because it's all we have or is the best tool for the job.

entry.title: Feel free to join the new Integration group in our community
entry.content:
You may have seen the announcement from SAP's Chief Product Officer for SAP Integration Suite about the launch of a new Integration group, a dedicated space within our SAP Community meant to collaborate across different integration topics.

Feel free to join this Integration group to exchange information, ask questions, post blogs posts etc. across different integration topics all under one hood, such as SAP Integration Suite and its capabilities like Cloud Integration, API Management, (Advanced) Event Mesh, Graph, etc., interface development as well as monitoring and error handling with SAP Application Interface Framework, integration strategy, etc.

What does this now mean for the topic pages such as the one for SAP Integration Suite?

Well, the topic pages remain, here you find all relevant information about the respective products like product documentation, roadmap information, new features, learning information, best practices, etc.

However, when accessing community content and creating new content, we have changed the navigation to ease the collaboration within the new Integration group. Let's check how this looks like for the SAP Integration Suite topic page.

The Community content menu now points to the new group. So, from here you can directly navigate to the Integration group.

The Create content has three entries:

  • You can Create a Question: this will create a new question below Technology Q&A which is automatically tagged with SAP Integration Suite. Note, this question won't show up in the group.
  • You can Start a Discussion: this is similar to asking a question but this time you navigate to the Discussion board of the Integration group.
  • You can Create a Blog Post: here you navigate to the Blog posts board of the Integration group where you are able to create a blog post which will then show up in the group.

By intention, we do not directly enter the discussion editor or the blog posts editor of the group but rather open the boards so that you are aware that you have navigated to the group. When you create a discussion or a blog post, don't forget to tag your post. Your content will show up in the group and depending on the tag also in the respective Community pages.

If you still like to access the Community pages, we have now added all links into the navigation pane of the topic page. Within the Community pages, you can also post content, but unfortunately this won't be shown in the group.

Enjoy collaboration! See you in the group then.

entry.title: Condition Contract: Customer who receives the rebate different to customers for turnover
entry.content:
Scenario: Customer A receives rebate for the turnover of customer B and C for certain materials, e.g.
3% for customer B material 1
5% for customer B material 2
10% for customer C material 1

I have created a condition contract for customer A, with the turnover selection for both customers B and C.
I have created 3 conditions with access sequence contract number, customer KUNNR, material:
customer B, material 1, 3%
customer B, material 2, 5%
customer C, material 1, 10%

Now when settling the contract, the bonus amount is 0. The system creates 2 line items in the settlement (one for material 1, one for material 2), and aggregates the total sales amount for BOTH customers in condition REBV of the settlement documents, and does not find any REB1-condition because it uses customer A to search for valid condition records.

How to make SAP use customers B and C to find a valid condition record?
How to make SAP to split the settlement into 3 lines?

A workaround solution would be to create 2 condition contracts, one for every customer whose turnover should be considered. But that is not my preferred solution, and in ECCS it would have been possible to cover above rebate scenario in 1 rebate agreement.

Can anyone help?

Thanks for your ideas!

entry.title: Re: How to use I_ProductTP_2 in mock-framework?
entry.content:
Hi Andre,

If you use the OSQL Test Environment, you're mocking the CDS View I_ProductTP_2 directly. If you use the CDS Test Environment, you mock the dependencies of CDS View I_ProductTP_2, which is used for testing CDS View I_ProductTP_2 itself.

If you however want to mock the RAP BO I_ProductTP_2 for EML statements, you have to use a RAP BO test double framework. Please see the help on the 2 different possibilities here: https://help.sap.com/docs/abap-cloud/abap-development-tools-user-guide/managing-dependencies-on-rap-business-objects-with-abap-unit

BR,
Alex

entry.title: Re: Speed up a BAPI update
entry.content:
Hi Ricky,

You can use background jobs, in your program you can split your records into different batches, say for each batch you want 10k records, it means you will then create 20 bacthes that will run concurrently in the background, this will use what ever number of processes are available in your system, if the maximum work processes for example is 6, then this will process 6 batches which have 10k records in each concurrently, and when one batch completes the next batch in line processes.

 

I have done this for another project where I had to load business partners.

 

Regards,

Tshepo

entry.title: Re: How to upload sales area details in BP T-code using custom program
entry.content: what was the solution, I'm facing same issue.

entry.title: Accounting document not getting generated for standard return order (CBAR)
entry.content:
Hello All,

We need accounting documentation when processing customer return orders, and we also require order-specific stock details in the stock report (Display overview stock). Could you please assist us in setting this up in the system? If this is dependent on refund control and follow-up activities, please let us know which parameters we should configure. 

Note: We are trying to excute standard return process in SAP public cloud system, however when we are selecting Refund as decide later the followup doucment does not provide any accounting document which is causing issue from finance. As there are no accounting entires generated for PGR we are not able to check inventory entries.

Looking forward for any help!

Regards
Mandark R.

entry.title: Re: Obtaining completed learning items from LMS and keeping them in client database via LMS API
entry.content: KB was removed, any new one ?

entry.title: Re: WB2R_SC - Settlement document that reduces business v...
entry.content:
Within customizing item "Define and Configure Profiles for Business Volume Determination" it is possible to configure "Additional Business Volume Tables". SAP delivers the following tables for the business volume of settlement documents:

  • VWB2_WBRKWBRP_1 Business Volume Settlement Doc Supplier Rebate
  • VWB2_WBRKWBRP_2 Business Volume Settlement Document for Customer Rebate
  • VWB2_WBRKWBRP1S Business Volume CCS Docs Supplier Rebate
  • VWB2_WBRKWBRP2S Business Volume CCS Docs Customer Rebate

I assume that VWB2_WBRKWBRP2S is the best starting point for your requirement.

entry.title: Re: Problem Doing ODATA Request with XCSRF Token
entry.content: Thanks, I did this already. I found out if I switched from axios to https.

entry.title: Re: Risk-Based Authentication works by adding a clientCon...
entry.content:
Hi @Rvanjari ,

Good day.

In a server-to-server integration for Risk-Based Authentication (RBA) with account locking, SAP CDC requires clientContext.

What does clientContext mean in this scenario?

  • The clientIP helps SAP CDC assess risk factors such as unusual login locations.
  • If the end-user’s real IP is not available (common in server-to-server setups), "0.0.0.0" can be passed, but this may impact how RBA rules are applied.

Impact of passing "0.0.0.0" or omitting clientIP

  • Passing "0.0.0.0" may prevent risk-based IP evaluations (e.g., geolocation, anomaly detection).
  • Omitting clientIP could result in certain RBA rules not being enforced, reducing security effectiveness.

Best Practice

  • If possible, retrieve the originating client’s IP from headers and pass that value instead of "0.0.0.0".
  • Ensure compliance with GDPR and other data privacy regulations when storing or processing IP addresses.

Regards,
Preethi G
SAP CDC Consultant

entry.title: Re: Control Length of input fields - sap Rap
entry.content:
Hi,

use the multiLineText

 

@ui: { lineItem: [ { position: 30 } ],

identification: [ { position: 30 } ] }

@ui.multiLineText: true

Not2;

entry.title: I have issues integrating Crystal for visual studio sp 37 into .net 8.0
entry.content:
This is my approach, I need help to fix:

  1. All previous instances of crystal are uninstalled with Vs Studio 2022 running .net 8.0 framework duly closed.
  2. Download the new Service Pack 37 x64 for 2022 and beyond, Download Sp 37 Runtime MSI x64 and Merge modules
  3. Install them in sequence.
  4. Open Vs 2022.
  5. I cannot see Crystal Reports Viewer on the Toolbox. Adding using choose items, browse to the .net libraries installed- Error: Component added but disabled
  6. Is not this service pack compatible with .net 8.0? Does that mean I am lost in the jungle of integrating Crystal with Vs.2022?

I have great respect for Crystal Reports since ver 8.5. 

Any tech there to help?

entry.title: Re: Problem Doing ODATA Request with XCSRF Token
entry.content:
I found the answer. 

It was the change from axios to https. I did the request as following. Now it works for me.

const oHeaders = {
   "X-Csrf-Token": sAuthToken,
   Accept: req.headers.accept,
   "Content-Type": req.headers["content-type"] ?? "application/json",
   Cookie: aCookies.join(";"),
};

const response = await makeHttpsRequest({
                        method: "GET",
                        hostname: new URL(sUrl).hostname,
                        path: new URL(sUrl).pathname,
                        headers: oHeaders,
                    });

const makeHttpsRequest = (options, postData = null) => {
    return new Promise((resolve, reject) => {
        const req = https.request(options, res => {
            let data = "";
            res.on("data", chunk => (data += chunk));
            res.on("end", () => {
                resolve({
                    status: res.statusCode,
                    headers: res.headers,
                    data: data,
                });
            });
        });

        req.on("error", err => reject(err));
        if (postData) req.write(postData);
        req.end();
    });
};

entry.title: Re: SAP Private Link service use cases for SAP Cloud Integration and SAP Build Work Zone, Standard E
entry.content:
Hi @hterminasyan 

Thanks for the blog—it provides a better understanding of private links.

I have some questions regarding this topic in the context of Cloud Integration. If I understood correctly, with SAP Private Link, it is possible to establish a "private channel" between our private landscape S4/ECC systems and Cloud Integration iFlows, ensuring that data transmission does not traverse the public internet to reach the iFlow endpoints (Azure Blob Storage use case acting as an iflow consumer).

To my knowledge, however, the public endpoint of the iFlows would still exist. Is there any way to make the public endpoint completely unavailable and restrict access exclusively through this private channel? (Considering the Cloud Runtime, not the Edge Cell.)

Thanks in advance.

Mikel

entry.title: Re: WBS creation using CNMASSCREATE executing error
entry.content:
Without knowing the context, it's hard to understand what's happening. However, it seems like you're trying to modify the level of an existing WBS Element, either in the database or in the spreadsheet. It would be helpful if you could share the complete messages, the spreadsheet and the project in CJ20N.

Regards
Marcio Blos

entry.title: Re: Filter Value help results in Child entity based on pa...
Re: Filter Value help results in Child entity based on pa...
entry.content:
If your requirement is to purely pass the parent entity's value's to a child entity's value help I'd do what I have done below. This is in the metadata extension of the item entity's field for which the value help is bound. In my case I had a material look up for which I had to send the plant, storage location and an external product group from the header. the material itself is picked up for the line item. 

The one thing I am struggling with this approach is when the look up entity has a parameter. Even though the additional binding field has a parameter field, it doesn't bind and doesn't pick up values. 

Perhaps @CarineTchoutouo would know a way around it 🙂 

@Consumption.valueHelpDefinition: [{
entity : { name : 'ZZC_MaterialLookUp' , element : 'Material' },
additionalBinding: [
{ element : 'Plant' , localElement: '_Header.Plant' , usage : #FILTER } ,
{ element: 'StorageLocation', localElement: '_Header.Outlet', usage :#FILTER },
{ element: 'ExternalProductGroup', localElement: '_Header.Commodity', usage : #FILTER },
{ element: 'Supplier', localElement: 'Supplier', usage :#RESULT },
{ element: 'OrderUnit', localElement: 'OrderUnit', usage :#RESULT },
{ element: 'NetPrice', localElement: 'NetPrice', usage :#RESULT },
{ element: 'Currency', localElement: 'Currency', usage : #RESULT }
]
}]

entry.title: Re: DMC POD Plugin local development environment in VS Code
entry.content:
Hi @subrahmanyam_pampana 

Is there a way the tool can interact with batch requests? For GET requests, I have no problem (for example, metadata requests). However, I have a Smart Table in my plugin that interacts with an ODATA Service. The backend always responds with: "Batch request payload is invalid." Is there a way I can provide the payload in the post method of your extRoutes.js ?

entry.title: Re: Re-Allocated Issue at Good Inventory transfer request

Hi Krishna Varma,

However, I am not sure what should be the behaviour for Inventory Transfer Request.

I would suggest you to create an incident for SAP Business One Support Team to get it investigated.

You can mention the link of this communication/thread while creating the incident.

Kind regards,

ANKIT CHAUHAN

SAP Business One Support

entry.title: Re: SAP Public Cloud CBC Organizational Structure Default Company Code and Cloud Warehouse
entry.content:
Dear All

Any support and expericne for above query.

entry.title: Re: Problems using Eclipse 2024-06 (4.32.0) Build id: 202...
entry.content:
Hi Peter

Since BW 7.50 this connection is no longer required to be able to do mixed modeling (use HANA CV-s in HCPR for example), as the metadata collection of the HANA artefacts is done by the backend and not by BW Modeling tools. This is also stated in the consulting Note:
2910005-BW Modeling Tools: Installation hints

===================================================

However, if you want to use HANA Views in a CompositeProvider on SAP BW 7.40, the installation of HANA Studio is required. In SAP BW 7.40 the HANA View models were loaded via the HANA System Connection connected to the BW project ("Attach HANA System"). Since SAP BW 7.50 SP4 and SAP BW/4HANA, the model information will be loaded via the ABAP stack directly from the server.
In this case, the "Attach HANA System" feature is not necessary and this functionality can be used for instance to switch from the BW object which consumes HANA views to the corresponding HANA View. So for usage of HANA Views in a CompositeProvider, the "Attach HANA System" is no longer required, except for 7.40.

The functionality "Attach HANA System" is implemented in the feature "BW Modeling Tools Integration with SAP HANA Studio". If no HANA Studio is available, this feature may not be displayed at installation time. Regarding the SAP update site, it is also possible that this feature is not offered depending on the used Eclipse version. Only when the SAP HANA Studio is also available on the SAP update site for the corresponding Eclipse version, the feature "BW Modeling Tools Integration with SAP HANA Studio" can be installed.
However, after activation of the SAP HANA Studio for an Eclipse version, an additional configuration step regarding the BW Modeling Tools by SAP is required. As a result, it can take up to 2 weeks until the feature "BW Modeling Tools Integration with SAP HANA Studio" is offered on the SAP update site when a new SAP HANA Studio version is available.

===================================================

If you want to browse the HANA objects of your system, use the "SAP HANA Administration" perspective to connect to the Database directly.

 

br

Roland

entry.title: Re: CAP Application 404 error after CF deployment
entry.content: Hi, thanks for your support.

entry.title: Re: CAP Application 404 error after CF deployment

Locally it's working fine

entry.title: Replikation aus dem WM ans ERP
entry.content:
Hallo zusammen,

ich verzweifle langsam. Wir haben ein dezentrales WM im Einsatz. Beide Systeme sind R3 SAP.

Sobald eine Lieferung im WM WA-gebucht wird, wird automatisch das ein IDOC vom Nachrichtentyp SHP_OBDLV_CONFIRM_DECENTRAL erstellt und an das ERP gesendet. 

Meine Frage ist jetzt, ob es eine Möglichkeit gibt auch vor dem Warenausgang eine Replikation ans ERP zu senden, wenn sich zum Beispiel die Liefermenge ändert. 

 

Ich bin für jeden Tipp dankbar. 

Gruß

entry.title: How to trigger workflow by creating a submit form through ui5 application
Re: Get the contracts list whose value is greater than 1...
entry.content:

 My SAC details are as below.

2024.21.15 (Client)
2024.21.14 (Server)
Commits
f9d1d5403a0c37205f1de578d197f1d6c1dc78da (Client)
5bfef6daf9c0af39e1e128ee1a4ecb4590b406a7 (Server)
Build Dates
Wed Jan 22 2025 18:23:57+0000 (Client)
Wed Jan 15 2025 18:43:29+0100 (Server)

Regards,

Rambabu

entry.title: Re: M-series Apple Chip MacBooks and Abap Platform Trial containers using Docker and Podman
entry.content:
Hi @TomHoepping 

I remember you mentioned before that the (now unavailable, but you have an old copy saved) Abap Trial 1909 still runs ok on Docker. And based on the error messages that come with Abap Trial 2022, then the fail-point is indeed about hdbdaemon not being able to get started.

So far, we are in the realm of what we know. Your idea, that it's related to the /proc stuff receiving the wrong arguments with "rosetta/" pre-pended... it's possible, though my feeling is that maybe not probable, as the root cause... because:

1. If you look at the github issue, it was raised in November 2023 and discussed in the months after that. But from summer 2023 till around March 2024, the Abap Trial 2022 on Docker Desktop for Mac, was working fine (including all processes related to hdbdaemon). So the time-periods are incompatible with something in Docker or Rosetta prepending "rosetta/" as the root cause of the issue for Abap Trial 2022.

2. Although it must be something to do with the HANA DB, as that is the main difference between Abap Trial 2022 and Abap Trial 1909 (Sybase DB) in terms of getting the database started (which always comes before any ASCS or CI app server can get started), I am not sure that from the point of view of Rosetta, it makes much difference what the process is... Rosetta is only interested in catching processes, which are trying to perform actions that are x64-specific. ... On the other hand, if you can run Abap Trial 1909 and see whether the /proc is receiving e.g. "sybasedaemon" or "rosetta/sybasedaemon", then that would remove the force of this "Point 2." if it turns out that sybasedaemon is fine because not calling up Rosetta... my guess, which could be wrong, is that Sybase is also doing x64-only stuff and needs to be caught by Rosetta...

But the main reason I think that the root cause is about security tightening for Rosetta, is that a load of issues were reported when, was it, Sonoma 14.4 update rolled out (not just issues for Abap Trial, but also many Java programs in Docker started failing). And those security updates are delivered via OS updates. So whether it is tighter sandboxing of emulated java processes or emulated hdbdaemon process, the results are rather similar, in effect as well as when they started occurring.

So I'm not proud: after all, my hypothesis is also guesswork, not knowledge; if it turns out that your hypothesis is right, and there would be a way to workaround the root cause it points to, then that would be great.

However, if we now do the thought experiment, and say that we assume the root cause is because of the way Apple is parsing the argv0 to /proc... it might be possible, as some suggested in the github thread, to let's say login to a container spun up already from the Abap Trial 2022 image, and do some clever rewrites somewhere, and save them, then restart the container so that, say, in the container, some scripts or utilities or arguments are able to accomodate "rosetta/" additions... might be. I doubt Julie's team would be getting involved in that though, as the idea of the Docker image is that it runs on a Linux VM on any platform... also, as this issue is not actually a showstopper, since for the subset of Abap Trial 2022 users with arm64 MacBooks, there is the UTM/QEMU path still available... so I doubt SAP would be greatly motivated to work on a solution for such a small set of consumers of a (free) SAP product...

Hence my hope is still that in the near future, adoption of arm64 Windows could be a motivation for SAP to provide a Linux arm64 Docker image. In general, many providers of Docker images and even non-containerised apps have started to provide arm64 builds, because in Linux world arm64 is already quite popular - for example, arm64 Ubuntu distros are already quite usable i.e. you can apt install lots of arm64(aarch64) versions of software already.

Sorry this is a bit of a ramble, kinda thinking out loud here 🙂 Have a nice day now, n regards, -dylan

entry.title: Re: Can I backup the S/4 Sap public edition system to an...
entry.content:
Dear Enrique

Thank you for contacting us through our community..

SAP S/4HANA Cloud, Public Edition does not provide direct mechanisms for backing up data to an external device due to its cloud nature. The data management, backup, and recovery processes are handled by SAP as part of their cloud services.

Below you will find some documents where you can find more details about the backup process for S/4Hana Cloud Public Edition.

Protect Your SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition - Security of Data Centers and External Auditing 

KBA 3396152 - FAQs about backup and recovery service for S/4HANA Public Cloud Customers 

I hope it can answer your question.

Kind regards,

Cheerio & thanks
Harry

entry.title: Re: Crystal Reports 13.0.37 crash in dtsagent.dll
entry.content:
SAP no longer gives out PDB's.

Can you describe the work flow of what is happening when this happens?

Is it reproducible or random?

That file does a lot of things so it could be Memory issues, formatting issues, DB Client issues, etc.

Is it one report, if so can you upload it also? I can run it through my main test app and see if anything shows up.

I worked for SAP for 26 years, retired now...

Is a WEB or Desktop app?

What OS is the app running on?

And anything else to help suggest how to debug the issue.

Don

entry.title: Find out if a component of a structure is a structure or a table type
entry.content:
Hi,

is there any way to describe a structure and than find out if the component is a structure or a table type? Something like this:

    DATA: lo_strucdescr TYPE REF TO cl_abap_structdescr.

    lo_strucdescr ?= cl_abap_typedescr=>describe_by_data( cs_ddic ).
    LOOP AT lo_strucdescr->components INTO DATA(ls_components).
        " Here determine if component is a structure or a table type
    ENDLOOP.

Thank you all for help 🙂

entry.title: Re: Identity and Access Management with Microsoft Entra, Part II: Provisioning to BTP and S/4HANA
entry.content:
Hi Martin

This is definitely huge news for people that have been struggling to integrate SAP with EntraID or IDM solutions. It's really awesome to know that SAP is making an important effort to integrate with standard protocols like SCIM to simplify provisioning.

What I think is missing is the big picture. I understand that this scenario works and someone might want to use for small scenarios, but I'd like to see something more architecture-oriented on these topics like:

    - Concept of "source system". in this case we have EntraID but some SAP customers might want to enrich IAS with attributes coming from other systems like SF. How this should be managed, what limitations do we have?

  - How should we organize this for bigger landscapes having multiple ABAP systems, SaaS solutions, etc. I see this hard to manage an monitor in big landscapes.

- I'm not sure if IAG will be at some point on top of this to play the role of IdM having interfaces to monitor synchronizations, reconcile, etc. IPS is great but is a "low-level" tool that pay the role of integrating but we need something on top to orchestrate the whole process. EntraID can play part of the role but we need some guidelines to organize the processes.

Thanks

Diego

entry.title: Re: Maintenance Assembly list
entry.content: Hello, Does someone knows how to get a list of the assembly with the linked materials?

entry.title: Re: Can we integrate Process manager and Process Collaboration with in Process Governance
entry.content:
When you use SAP Signavio Process Manager for process modeling, you can use SAP Signavio Process Governance to manage process diagram approvals. SAP Signavio Process Manager triggers these process diagram approval workflows, which run in SAP Signavio Process Governance and in turn update the process model in SAP Signavio Process Manager.

The Set model state action automatically updates the diagram state in SAP Signavio Process Manager and SAP Signavio Process Collaboration Hub, for example to mark the diagram as approved or in progress. You typically use this as part of a management approval process that marks the diagram as accepted or rejected.

Can you elaborate on the user case, I am happy to help you further!

entry.title: Re: FLP failed to load catalogs after system copy - what...
entry.content: Unfortunately, there is no general procedure. After a system copy is before a system copy and you would have to create a customer-specific checklist. I would put something together.

entry.title: Re: SAP Private Link service use cases for SAP Cloud Integration and SAP Build Work Zone, Standard E
entry.content:
Hey @MMZ,

BTP endpoints including SAP Cloud Integration are internet-facing by design - like any other SaaS product out there. No way to make that private. SaaS security is about securing app layer not network.

Depending on your scenario you might consider using a timer trigger on your iflow to avoid having an endpoint outside.

KR Martin

So, unless you work for these customers, you will not be able to access the documents 😞

Best regards
Harry

entry.title: Re: Allocation with an # that should be spread - SAC
entry.content: Ok

entry.title: Re: Crystal Reports 13.0.37 crash in dtsagent.dll
entry.content:
Hello,

It's a desktop app. The error appears on any windows version. The memory dump is for Windows 11.

Apparently I found the problem. We have a windows form which preview the report. In this window it seems that we call CrystalReportViewer.RefreshReport too many times on the load of the form. After I replaced this with something like viewer.ReportSource = viewer.ReportSource the error disappeared. I found that these 2 methods seem to do approximatively the same thing.

Another problem, if viewer.ReportSource = viewer.ReportSource called together with viewer.RefreshReport again breaks the report viewer. If the report has a datasource set into code with SetDataSource(dataset), the report lose this datasource and tries to connect to the database used to design the report. I suppose that RefreshReport does this...

Probably RefreshReport break something if it is called too fast.

I can consider the problem solved, but with this workaround... which is a little weird...

Sorry for my english...

Thank you for the answer.

Gabi

entry.title: Re: Issue in PS Cash Management Planned payment coming fr...
entry.content:
I thought that was the standard behavior of the system but I have the same problem:

Payments committed by invoice with transaction VF01 (value type 54) never reduce the planned payments recorded from the order's billing plan (value type = 62).

This is a problem because the report S_ALR_87013573 shows the summed records and that is incorrect.

Does anyone have a solution?

Thanks in advance

entry.title: Re: Flush method is sap mdg fpm

entry.title: How to transfer a paid down payment from sales order 1 to sales order 2?
entry.content:
Hi all,

Let's see the next scenario:

Sales person creates a sales order 1.

A down payment request is created linked to this SO.

This down payment is paid.

The customer will deliver the items based on sales order but some is item is missing.

Final invoice is created and some amount is open from the down payment. The sales person would like to sell another thing to the customer but it means a different business, so he creates a new sales order 2.

The sales order 1 is finished. It was final invoiced, all payments is done.

But there is a remanining amount on the linked down payment. 
How could be linked to the new sales order? Is it possible to transfer it to another sales order?

I have learned that when the final invoice is created from the outbound delivery invoice request then all linked down payment to the original sales order, is automatically take into account in this final invoice.
No way to add another open down payment to the outbound delivery invoice request...

 

Any idea how to solve it?

entry.title: Re: U.S Tax Reporter Year End 2024
entry.content: We've recently noticed that Box 13(Retirement Plan Indicator) is not checked for 2024.  Has been checked for previous years and still checks when executing for previous years.  All year-end related notes have been applied.  No changes made to Tax Form Group or Tax Form Fields.  Any ideas what could be causing this?  I've created ticket for SAP to evaluate.

entry.title: Re: CALM & MS Teams Integration changes due to MS O365 co...
entry.content:
@john_p_grimesEscuse me to come back to this topic after that long time.
You wrote "Incoming Webhooks are created per-channel, not per Team .." but in your drawing on "MS Teams" side you named the webhooks for channel A & B (Webhook I) and channel C & D (Webhook II) the same. 
As well as on the destination side of the BTP CALM subaccount.
Is your drawing right or is it a copy&paste mistake?

Thanks for a clarification and best regards,

Dirk

entry.title: Re: ABAP CDS Enum declaration and accessing values
entry.content:
For future readers: The base type must match with Enum definition

This works:

    types ty_c type c length 8.
    out->write( conv string( ze_testenum-mon ) ).
    out->write( conv ty_c( ze_testenum-mon ) ).

 Output is:

MON <-- Base type doesn't match
1   <-- Base type of conversion matches with Enum defintion

entry.title: Re: Set a fix locale in Plateau Report Designer
entry.content:
I found the answer:
Select

LocTitleEn.label_value as "Fix English Locale of Title"

From

pa_sched a

LEFT OUTER JOIN PA_I18N_LOCALIZED_LABEL LocTitleEn ON LocTitleEn.LABEL_ID = a.schd_desc AND LocTitleEn.LOCALE_ID = 'English'

This works fine, but I get some issues with the dynamic selection of filters when running the report in SF.

I mean: When I run the report in SF LRN and go into the search filters to define which classes I want to see in the report, then this works fine, whenever I eventually display all classes I want and select them. E. G.: I look for classes with title "ABC", display the results, select all found classes and run my report. So, this is basically a static search.

When I only add "ABC" as filter to the search without explicitely selecting the classes (so a dynamic search), the report fails. I have no idea...

entry.title: SAP Analytics Cloud tenants on Quarterly Release Cycle (QRC) updates in 2025
entry.content:
Upcoming enhancements in SAP Analytics Cloud for the year 2025 can be accessed through the Road Map page.

Explore the latest features, highlights and updates from our recent releases on the page  https://www.sap.com/products/cloud-analytics/features/release-highlights.html .

If you're seeking information on release dates from the preceding year, 2024, you can refer to the details provided in this Blog Post.

SAP Analytics Cloud aligns with SAP’s global strategy for cloud application releases, following SAP Cloud products 2025 calendar:

  • SAP Analytics Cloud
  • SAP Ariba
  • SAP Business Network (incl. SAP Business Network for Procurement, SAP Business Network Asset Collaboration, and SAP Business Network for Logistics)
  • SAP BTP, ABAP environment
  • SAP Business Technology Platform (see exceptions)
  • SAP Concur
  • SAP Customer Experience* (see exceptions)
  • SAP Enterprise Asset Management
  • SAP Fieldglass
  • SAP Integrated Business Planning
  • SAP Manufacturing
  • SAP Product Lifecycle Management
  • SAP S/4HANA Cloud (Public Edition) (see exceptions)
  • SAP SuccessFactors (see exceptions)

*Excludes SAP Commerce Cloud releases

Customer-impacting releases may only take place in February, May, August and November each year.

 

Following each update, upon logging into SAP Analytics Cloud, you will encounter a prominent notification banner featuring a link to our informative "What’s New" help content. You will see Help page of What’s New-2024 Releases.

 

SAP Harmonized Quarterly Updates for 2025 are the following:

  • 2025 Q1: Feb 14-16 (2025.01)
  • 2025 Q2: May 16-18 (2025.08)
  • 2025 Q3: Aug 15-17 (2025.14)
  • 2025 Q4: Nov 14-16 (2025.21)

For more details, see KBA 2888562.

SAP Analytics Cloud QRC release calendar 2025

 

SAP Analytics Cloud, as all cloud products, may have an optional, no-impact release on harmonized monthly feature delivery weekends.

As with the quarterly releases, each product has the option to release during any or all of these windows. Customers should not need to prepare for or take action for the monthly feature deliveries.

 

Note: Content can only be moved between systems on different release cycles at the time of a quarterly release cycle update.

To transport using Content Network: The source and destination systems need to be on the same quarterly version of SAP Analytics Cloud, or the following quarterly version. If the importing system is on an older version, the package won’t appear. If it’s two or more versions ahead of the exporting system, the package’s content may not be supported.

Using the Transport (file) Method (zipped / .TGZ files) – Content can only be imported in the same version of the application from which it was exported, or the subsequent version. After your system is upgraded again, you cannot import the content.

Regards

entry.title: Re: cl_cds_test_environment for nested CDS views
entry.content: But that will not mock the Entity I_BillingDocument (regarding MODIFY ENTITY), only SELECT is available and even that on only the explicitly named CDS. Any CDS selecting from the mocked CDS won't see the mocked data.

entry.title: Free text in automatic payment (F110)
entry.content:
Dear SAP Public Community,

Our requirement is to insert a free text, during the creation of an automatic payment through Manage Automatic Payment app (F110 tcode), that will be reported in the correspondente accounting document generated in SAP as header/item text (NOT in the correspondente DME file).

From my knowledge this is not possible by standard and this is the reason of my question. Have you any possible idea for this?

Best Regards

Liliana Ferreira
